quiz.question:
White has moved their rook to e8 and offered a rook trade. 

Should we trade the rooks or do something else?

answers.text: We should trade the rooks. Our king will be much safer and there will be higher drawing chances.

feedback.text: That's right! White's queen and rook combo is very dangerous.

distractors.text: We shouldn't trade the rooks. We should keep as much pieces on the board as possible, since White is up in material.

feedback.text: Moving the rooks leads to a very quick checkmate after Rg8+!
